claim_boundary: Toolmaker/mold-flow request and fail-closed response review; CAD tooling placeholders are not toolmaker signoff.
plastic: PC+ABS or glass-filled PC/ABS, molded orange
gate_strategy: two submarine gates into back cover long edge, fan gate alternate for color consistency

process_window.material_family: PC+ABS or glass-filled PC/ABS, molded orange
process_window.drying: Dry PC+ABS per resin datasheet before molding; record dryer dew point and residence time.
process_window.pack_hold: Start with 95-99% fill transfer, stepped pack/hold DOE, and gate-freeze study.
process_window.venting: Add vents at end-of-fill around top corners, camera window, USB saddle, and snap-hook roots.
cosmetic_controls: Orange color plaque approval before tool texture freeze.
Gate vestige and blush review on first shots under production lighting.
Texture-depth/draft review before any hard-tool steel commitment.

mold_process_cases.target: <= 120 preferred, <= 160 caution for long thin PC+ABS shells
mold_process_cases.note: Uses full device height over nominal wall as a conservative CAD proxy until mold-flow exists.

mold_process_cases.target: Quote tool and press capacity above the high estimate with supplier resin pressure data.
mold_process_cases.note: Uses 0.35-0.55 tons/cm2 as an early PC+ABS projected-area quote window.

mold_process_cases.target: 0.50-0.80 wall ratio with toolmaker-confirmed gate land and vestige
mold_process_cases.note: Small gates protect cosmetics but raise orange streak/blush and shear sensitivity.

mold_process_cases.target: >= 2.0 diameters, with final baffles/conformal cooling from toolmaker
mold_process_cases.note: Straight CAD channels are layout evidence only; cycle time and warp need tool simulation.

mold_process_cases.target: boss wall <= 1.10x nominal and ribs <= 0.70x nominal
mold_process_cases.note: Bosses and battery ribs need steel-safe coring and texture review to avoid read-through.

mold_process_cases.target: 8 pins with marks hidden from exterior A-surfaces
mold_process_cases.note: Modeled ejectors prove review intent, not pin balance or cosmetic approval.

request_items.request: Run fill/pack/warp simulation on orange PC+ABS shell and side-frame tool concept.
request_items.required_return: Mold-flow report with pressure, fill time, weld lines, air traps, sink, shrink, and warp plots.

request_items.request: Review dual submarine gate and cold-runner layout against cosmetic gate vestige limits.
request_items.required_return: Signed gate/runner recommendation with gate land, gate area, vestige location, and alternate fan-gate decision.

request_items.request: Review modeled ejector pins against non-cosmetic surfaces, boss support, and part release.
request_items.required_return: Ejector layout markup with witness-mark acceptance and any added blade/sleeve ejectors.

request_items.request: Review straight cooling-channel placeholders and propose production baffles or conformal cooling.
request_items.required_return: Cooling layout with channel diameter, clearance, circuiting, expected cycle time, and hot-spot risk.

request_items.request: Confirm resin shrink, steel-safe stock, datum scheme, and CMM tuning plan.
request_items.required_return: Shrink/warp allowance table tied to GD&T datums and first-article CMM plan.

request_items.request: Approve hard orange PC+ABS color, gloss, texture depth, gate blush tolerance, and scratch samples.
request_items.required_return: Color plaque, texture plaque, gate-blush limit sample, and signed CMF acceptance criteria.

request_items.request: Quote and approve first-shot DOE covering melt temperature, mold temperature, pack pressure, hold time, and cooling time.
request_items.required_return: DOE run sheet and acceptance plan for first shots before DVT tool tuning.

release_rule: Every toolmaker item must name the toolmaker, return a report/drawing artifact, be accepted by reviewer, and close mold-flow/tooling questions before tooling release.
